commit.message:
LU-15643 test: collect log for sanity-scrub test_8

osd_fid_lookup() will try lookup mapping even if it's marked stale,
because there may be race that this mapping was fixed already, but
it shouldn't trigger scrub repeatedly.

sanity-scrub test_8 failed on janitor, enable full debug to understand
the failure.
